vocab.meaning: tình trạng đình trệ hoàn toàn/tắc nghẽn không lối thoát
vocab.example: When the road hits a total deadlock, I usually turn off the engine to save fuel and wait for the situation to ease.
To kill time during a long hold-up, I often dive into an educational podcast or a catchy playlist.

vocab.meaning: tình trạng ùn tắc giao thông quy mô lớn (tại các ngã tư)
vocab.example: During a severe gridlock, I find it's best to stay patient and avoid making unnecessary lane changes.

vocab.meaning: giữ bình tĩnh, không nóng nảy
vocab.example: It's easy to get frustrated when you're late, but I try to keep my cool by practicing deep breathing exercises.
When the cars are moving at a snail's pace, I take the opportunity to catch up on the latest world news via the radio.

vocab.meaning: thử thách lòng kiên nhẫn của ai đó
vocab.example: Being stuck in a bottleneck for over an hour really tests my patience, especially in the sweltering heat.

vocab.meaning: cực kỳ nhàm chán/mê muội đầu óc
vocab.example: The mind-numbing wait in a traffic jam is slightly more bearable if I have a good audiobook to keep me engaged.

vocab.meaning: tìm lộ trình khác/đổi hướng đi
vocab.example: I always check my GPS app to see if it can re-route me through some backstreets to bypass the main congestion.

vocab.meaning: xe cộ nối đuôi nhau san sát
vocab.example: In bumper-to-bumper traffic, I focus on maintaining a safe distance and just going with the flow.

vocab.meaning: lo lắng/phiền lòng về điều gì
vocab.example: Instead of fretting over the delay, I try to use the time productively by planning my schedule for the rest of the day.
